name: Welcome / Initial Follow-Up
subject: Thank you for your interest, {{firstName}}!

name: Follow-Up / Check-In
subject: Following up on your home inquiry, {{firstName}}

name: Appointment Confirmation

name: Drip Campaign - Month 1
subject: Still thinking about your home move, {{firstName}}?
body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We wanted to check in and see if your home transport plans have progressed.

We're still here to help whenever you're ready! Our team specializes in {{homeType}} transport and would love to assist you.

Give us a call or reply to this email to reconnect.

Best regards,
{{agentName}}
